zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany於大約1507年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾巴甘尼時，他的父親Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany17歲，母親Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum11505歲。他於1534年與Lady Marion Kennedy結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年9月10日在蘇格蘭維托史爾吉諾 豪斯享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany于大约1507年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾巴甘尼时，他的父亲Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany17岁，母亲Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum11505岁。他于1534年与Lady Marion Kennedy结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年9月10日在苏格兰維托史爾吉諾 豪斯享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany was born about 1507, in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, was 17 and his mother, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, was 11505. He married Lady Marion Kennedy in 1534. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 September 1547, in Genoch House, Wigtownshire, Scotland, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany est né environ 1507, à Bargany, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, avait 11505 ans. Il a épousé Lady Marion Kennedy en 1534. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1547, à Genoch House, Wigtownshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany um 1507 in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany 17 und seine Mutter Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum 11505. Er hat 1534 Lady Marion Kennedy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. September 1547 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Genoch House, Wigtownshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany è nato il circa 1507 nel Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, aveva 11505 anni. Lui sposato Lady Marion Kennedy nel 1534. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 settembre 1547, nel Genoch House, Wigtownshire, Scotland, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Kennedy 5th of Barganyが約1507年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアバーガニーで生まれた時，父Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Barganyは17歳，母Mariot Dunbar of Mochrumは11505歳であった。1534年にLady Marion Kennedyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年9月10日にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアジェノチ ホーウゼで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany(이)가 대략 1507년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 바건이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum(은)는 11505세였다. 그는 1534년 Lady Marion Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 9월 10일 스컷랜드 위그타운실르 노치 허스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany nasceu aproximadamente 1507, em Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, tinha 11505 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Marion Kennedy em 1534. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1547, em Genoch House, Wigtownshire, Scotland, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany родился около 1507 г. в местности баргани, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, 11505. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Marion Kennedy в 1534 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 сентября 1547 г. в местности дженох хоус, вигтоуншир, Шотландия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Kennedy 5th of Bargany nació aproximadamente 1507, en Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, tenía 11505 años. Se casó con Lady Marion Kennedy en 1534. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1547, en Genoch House, Wigtownshire, Scotland, a la edad de 41 años.
